title: Joca's Promotion
description: A narrative lesson on navigating a promotion: acknowledgment, negotiation, new expectations.
summary_pt_br: Promoção: linguagem de honra, negociação antes de aceitar, primeiros 90 dias, alinhamento.

scenes.subtitle_en: A narrative lesson on navigating a promotion: acknowledgment, negotiation, new expectations.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Promoção: linguagem de honra, negociação antes de aceitar, primeiros 90 dias, alinhamento.

scenes.text_en: A narrative lesson on navigating a promotion: acknowledgment, negotiation, new expectations. Focus: joca's promotion. I'm honored to be considered for this role.
scenes.text_pt: Promoção: linguagem de honra, negociação antes de aceitar, primeiros 90 dias, alinhamento. Foco: joca's promotion. Sinto-me honrado de ser considerado.

scenes.title: Joca's Promotion
scenes.body_en: Navigation language: 'I'm honored to be considered', 'Before I accept, I'd like to discuss', 'My priority in the first ninety days', 'Let's align on expectations'.
scenes.body_pt: Promoção: linguagem de honra, negociação antes de aceitar, primeiros 90 dias, alinhamento.

examples.en: I'm honored to be considered for this role.
Before I accept, I'd like to discuss scope and compensation.
examples.pt: Antes de aceitar, gostaria de discutir escopo e remuneração.

examples.en: My priority in the first ninety days is listening.
examples.pt: Minha prioridade nos primeiros 90 dias é escutar.

exercise.question: Complete: "I'm honored to be ___ for this role."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I'm honored to be considered for this role."

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Before I accept, I'd like to discuss scope and compensation.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Before I accept, I'd like to discuss scope and compensation."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Antes de aceitar, gostaria de discutir escopo e remuneração.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Joca's Promotion — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre joca's promotion. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca, we'd like to offer you the lead role.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I'm honored — thank you for the trust.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Would you like to accept today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Before I accept, I'd like to discuss scope.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Equity growth and clear performance reviews.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What's your plan for the first ninety days?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Listen first, align, then ship fast.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Any concerns you want to name now?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I want to avoid burnout by delegating earlier.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Clear priorities, clear boundaries. Good leader.

scenes.title: The promotion conversation
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Joca's negotiation approach. Use at least three promotion phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the quiet corner office, Joca met with the CEO to discuss a role he had not applied for.

paragraphs.speaker: CEO
paragraphs.en: We believe you're ready for the lead engineering role, and we'd like to formalize that this week.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: I'm honored to be considered. Before I accept, I'd like to align on scope and compensation openly.

paragraphs.speaker: CEO
paragraphs.en: Fair. What are the two non-negotiables you'd want written into the offer up front?

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Clear performance reviews every quarter, and explicit authority over the hiring plan for my team.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: A promotion, Joca knew, is not a reward — it is a larger invitation to responsibility on tougher terms.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Joca's Promotion". A narrative lesson on navigating a promotion: acknowledgment, negotiation, new expectations. I'm honored to be considered for this role. Before I accept, I'd like to discuss scope and compensation. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Joca's Promotion". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
